name: Edge of the Knife Rivals Deck
plot: While using this Rivals deck, fighters with a Health characteristic of 2 or less and/or 2 or more damage tokens are tempered.

cards.name: Aggressive Defender
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker is holding a treasure token.

cards.name: All In
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if there are no tempered friendly fighters in friendly territory and any tempered friendly fighters are in neutral and/or enemy territory.

cards.name: Behind Enemy Lines
cards.text: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if a tempered friendly fighter holds a feature token in enemy territory.

cards.name: Calm Before the Storm
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if there are any damaged fighters and those fighters are not adjacent.

cards.name: Double Team
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target was Flanked by a friendly fighter.

cards.name: Immovable
cards.text: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter was the target of an Attack in that Action step while they were tempered and the target was not slain.

cards.name: Power in Numbers
cards.text: Score this immediately after an Action step if 3 or more tempered fighters with no Move tokens are adjacent. If you are the underdog score this if 2 or more tempered fighters with no Move tokens are adjacent instead.

cards.name: Risky Position
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if a tempered friendly fighter is in enemy territory.

cards.name: Sneak Into Position
cards.text: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if 2 or more tempered friendly fighters are adjacent to the same enemy fighter.

cards.name: Trial of the Tempered
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if each fighter is tempered.

cards.name: Two-pronged Assault
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more tempered friendly fighters are in enemy territory.

cards.name: Usurper
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if an enemy leader was slain by a tempered friendly fighter this battle round.

cards.name: Death Throes
cards.text: Pick a tempered friendly fighter. In the next Action step, Attacks that target this fighter have -2 Attack dice.

cards.name: Fake Out!
cards.text: Pick an enemy fighter with a Health characteristic of 3 or more that is adjacent to a tempered friendly fighter, and then roll an Attack dice. If the roll contains any {icon:hammer} or {icon:sword}, inflict 1 damage on that fighter, and then give that fighter a stagger token. If you are the underdog, the roll can also contain {icon:crit}.

cards.name: Final Stand
cards.text: In the next Action step, tempered friendly fighters cannot be pushed.

cards.name: Opportunity Strikes
cards.text: Play this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack for a tempered friendly fighter. That weapon had +1 Attack dice for that Attack.

cards.name: Power from Death
cards.text: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter with a bounty of 1 or more is slain by an enemy fighter, if that fighter was tempered before inflicting the damage that would slay them. Draw up to 3 Power cards.

cards.name: Running Riot
cards.text: Play this immediately after a tempered friendly fighter's successful Attack. Pick another friendly fighter. That fighter is tempered.

cards.name: Sidestep
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Spiteful Traps
cards.text: Pick an enemy fighter with a Health characteristic of 3 or more within 2 hexes of your leader. Give that fighter a Move token.

cards.name: Synchronised Effort
cards.text: Pick 2 tempered friendly fighters within 4 hexes of each other. Remove those fighters from the battlefield and then place each in the hex the other was removed from.

cards.name: The Uprising!
cards.text: All friendly fighters are tempered in the next Action step.

cards.name: Dark Horse
cards.text: This fighter is tempered.

cards.name: Deadly Aim
cards.text: This fighter's weapons have Ensnare.

cards.name: Fuelled by Pain
cards.text:
Melee Attack action
{icon:hex} 1 {icon:hammer} X {icon:damage} 2
{icon:crit} Ensnare
X is equal to the number of damage tokens this fighter has.

cards.name: Great Fortitude
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Health.

cards.name: Impervious
cards.text: While this fighter is tempered, Save rolls for this fighter cannot be affected by Cleave and Ensnare.

cards.name: Lash Out
cards.text: Thrash: Immediately after this fighter is slain, before removing them from the battlefield, roll a number of Save dice equal to the battle round. For each {icon:block}, give an enemy fighter within 2 hexes of this fighter a Move token.

cards.name: Mobbed!
cards.text: When this fighter Attacks, if the target is within 3 hexes of any other friendly fighters, the target is Flanked and Surrounded for that Attack. Restricted

cards.name: Parting Shot
cards.text: Pyrrhic Strike: Immediately after this fighter is slain by an enemy fighter, before removing them from the battlefield, pick an enemy fighter within 2 hexes of them. Give that fighter a stagger token. If this fighter was tempered before inflicting the damage that would slay them, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

cards.name: Pesky Nuisance
cards.text: Enemy fighters adjacent to this fighter must target this fighter with any Attacks.

cards.name: Sharpened Points
cards.text: This fighter's weapons have Cleave.
